findings.description: no_knowledge_content=true but source contains extensive Layer A/B content across 10 major sections.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains: (1) configuration properties table for FailureLogFormatter (failureLogFormatter.className, defaultFailureCode, defaultMessage, language, notificationFormat, analysisFormat, contactFilePath, appFailureCodeFilePath, fwFailureCodeFilePath) with types and defaults; (2) class/API specs: FailureLogUtil, FailureLogFormatter, TransactionAbnormalEnd, ProcessAbnormalEnd; (3) decision guidance: when to use FailureLogUtil vs TransactionAbnormalEnd/ProcessAbnormalEnd; (4) security warning about masking personal/confidential data in $data$ placeholder; (5) placeholder table ($failureCode$, $message$, $data$, $contact$); (6) multiple code examples in Java and properties format; (7) contact info configuration (failure-log-contact.properties, prefix-match search behavior); (8) runtime failure code override mechanism for both app codes and framework codes; (9) derived execution info output method; (10) FailureLogFormatter extension/customization pattern.
